text:
prison, place in which people are, for legal reasons, physically confined and usually deprived of a range of personal freedoms, also known as slammer, gaol, jail, penitentiary, pokey. Attributes include: 
- OpenStreetMap tag: "amenity=prison"
- Commons category: "Prisons"
- subclass of: "architectural structure",
 "institution"
- main Wikidata property: "place of detention"
- described by source: "Explanatory Dictionary of the Living Great Russian Language",
 "Brockhaus and Efron Encyclopedic Dictionary",
 "Brockhaus and Efron Encyclopedic Dictionary",
 "Brockhaus and Efron Encyclopedic Dictionary",
 "Brockhaus and Efron Encyclopedic Dictionary",
 "Granat Encyclopedic Dictionary",
 "Gujin Tushu Jicheng",
 "Encyclopædia Britannica 11th edition",
 "Pauly–Wissowa"
- has use: "punishment",
 "reform",
 "incarceration",
 "imprisonment"
- part of: "corrections",
 "human settlement"
- named after: "Tyr (applies to name of subject: тюрьма)"
- maintained by WikiProject: "WikiProject Crime and Criminal Biography",
 "WikiProject Correction and Detention Facilities"
